channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scream 7 Nailed This Iconic Aspect Of The Franchise
One MCU Movie Is Actually Quietly A Great Romantic Comedy
The Forgotten Resident Evil Movie Is Trending Ahead Of The New 2026 Film
White House Uses ‘Call of Duty’ Footage Promoting Iran Strikes, in Video
item.description: The White House is flexing its muscles in the escalating conflict with Iran ... sharing a highlight video of U.S. strikes that bizarrely opens with fo...

item.title: Bhad Bhabie Steps Out on SKIMS Shopping Trip With Boyfriend Le Vaughn
item.description: It looks like Bhad Bhabie and Le Vaughn are still going strong ... and shopping 'til they drop at Kim Kardashian's SKIMS store in Los Angeles! Check o...

item.title: Zendaya All Smiles in New Pic Amid Claim She's Married to Tom Holland
item.description: Zendaya is seemingly having the time of her life amid a claim by her stylist she and Tom Holland secretly got hitched. Check out this photo of the act...

item.title: Britney Spears Arrested in California for DUI
item.description: Britney Spears was arrested in Ventura County, California Wednesday night for a DUI, law enforcement sources tell TMZ. The pop superstar was handcuffe...

item.title: Savannah Guthrie Visits 'Today' Show Studio Amid Nancy's Kidnapping Case
